mapper.insert: INSERT INTO zine_ratings (user_id, zine_id, rating, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{zineId}, #{rating}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM zine_ratings WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND zine_id = #{zineId}

SELECT #{zineId} AS zine_id, COALESCE(AVG(rating), 0) AS average_rating, COUNT(*) AS total_ratings, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE rating = 5.0) AS rating_50, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE rating = 4.5) AS rating_45, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE rating = 4.0) AS rating_40, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE rating = 3.5) AS rating_35, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE rating = 3.0) AS rating_30, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE rating = 2.5) AS rating_25, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE rating = 2.0) AS rating_20, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE rating = 1.5) AS rating_15, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE rating = 1.0) AS rating_10, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE rating = 0.5) AS rating_05 FROM zine_ratings WHERE zine_id = #{zineId}
